title: Decadent Venezuelan Chicken Wrap
description: Buttery, snappy, indulgent Venezuelan chicken wrapped in fragrant pandan leaves and ancho chili flavor.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and add butter until melted.
Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add diced chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 6-7 minutes.
Stir in ancho chili paste and lime juice, cooking for another 2 minutes to blend flavors.
Remove chicken from heat and stir in chopped cilantro, salt, and pepper.
Lay a pandan leaf flat on a clean surface and place the chicken mixture in the center.
Fold the sides of the leaf over the filling and roll tightly to form a wrap, securing with a toothpick if desired.
Serve warm, optionally with a side of fresh salsa or a drizzle of lime crema.
